subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He in Whose hand is the dominion of the heavens and of the earth, and with Whom are the treasuries of all knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی بیده ملکوت السموات و الارض و عنده خزائن العلوم من کل شیء و ما
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God
